recommendations.title: Black Christmas
recommendations.overview: A group of sorority pledges are stalked by a stranger during their Christmas break. That is until the young women discover that the killer is part of an underground campus conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: Cold Prey II
recommendations.overview: After surviving the events in the Jotunheimen mountains in which four of her friends were murdered, the badly injured Jannicke is brought to the local hospital. But when she wakes up, the building is dark and deserted... and she soon realizes that he

recommendations.title: The Watchers
recommendations.overview: A young artist gets stranded in an extensive, immaculate forest in western Ireland, where, after finding shelter, she becomes trapped alongside three strangers, stalked by mysterious creatures each night.

recommendations.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
recommendations.overview: Plagued by a violent recurring nightmare, college student Stefanie heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

recommendations.title: Sorority House Massacre
recommendations.overview: Upon joining a sorority, Beth is plagued by nightmares of a knife-wielding killer, when her past comes back to haunt her.

recommendations.title: They/Them
recommendations.overview: Campers at an LGBTQ+ conversion camp endure unsettling psychological techniques while the campsite is stalked by a mysterious killer.

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: An American family on holiday in Africa becomes lost in a game reserve and stalked by vicious killer lions.

recommendations.title: No One Gets Out Alive
recommendations.overview: An immigrant in search of the American dream is forced to take a room in a boarding house and soon finds herself in a nightmare from which she can't escape.

recommendations.title: Lady in White
